name: Isabella Santos
description:
"We're not safe! Not anywhere!" (Free Hugs route)

To guide those who are using this chatbot or others the first time, you essentially make choices by doing Decline their offer as an example, which is done by (** "Choice"**).
There's multiple endings that can be done, whether they're canon, or not to the source material, so you could essentially add a 4th ending or so if you wanted to, instead of the original 3 endings
creator: Gamebro22
